summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Voice Island feature implementation. Both backend widget.js and frontend SandboxTab.js contain complete Voice Island functionality with all required components working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/widget.js returns complete Voice Island implementation
Widget.js contains all required DOM elements (ep-vi, ep-vi-oval, ep-vi-orb, ep-vi-mute, ep-vi-close, ep-vi-wave)
Widget.js uses localStorage (not sessionStorage) for persistence
Widget.js has morph animation CSS (epChatIn/epChatOut keyframes)
Widget.js includes bottom wave with 3 SVG layers (w1, w2, w3)
Sandbox init and message endpoints functional
Frontend sandbox Voice Island opens when mic button clicked
Voice Island displays centered oval with orb, mute button, close button
Voice Island shows last user and bot messages
Voice Island mute button toggles state correctly
Voice Island close button restores normal chat with history preserved
Bottom wave animation visible and state-reactive
Voice Island orb changes color based on state (idle/muted)
Regular chat functionality works after Voice Island usage
Streaming message functionality still works in text mode
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (12/12 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (Voice Island fully functional)
